field.title: geo_url
field.guid_formula:
IF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'bali') THEN
    "Bali"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'dubai') THEN
    "Dubai"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'dhabi') THEN
    "Abu-Dhabi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'moscow') AND NOT ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'elite') THEN
    "Moscow"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'moscow-elite') THEN
    "Moscow Elite"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'phuket') THEN
    "Phuket"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'batumi') THEN
    "Batumi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'cyprus') THEN
    "Cyprus"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'thai') THEN
    "Thailand"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'uae') THEN
    "UAE"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'sochi') THEN
    "Sochi"
END
field.formula:
IF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'bali') THEN
    "Bali"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'dubai') THEN
    "Dubai"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'dhabi') THEN
    "Abu-Dhabi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'moscow') AND NOT ICONTAINS([referrer], 'elite') THEN
    "Moscow"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'moscow-elite') THEN
    "Moscow Elite"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'phuket') THEN
    "Phuket"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'batumi') THEN
    "Batumi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'cyprus') THEN
    "Cyprus"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'thai') THEN
    "Thailand"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'uae') THEN
    "UAE"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'sochi') THEN
    "Sochi"
END

field.title: CRQ
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_8mx1]) / COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_8mx1]) / COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4])
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([leads_id]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([leads_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([leads_id])
END

field.title: Период
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN 
    [creation_date_3oqi]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_3oqi], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_3oqi], 'year')
END
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN 
    [creation_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'year')
END
